overview.headline: Senior Full-Stack Engineer & Co-founder building scalable AI and distributed systems

summary.short: Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience in scalable backend systems, microservices, and AI-powered platforms.
summary.medium: Experienced in Node.js, NestJS, React, and cloud-native architectures. Co-founding Habesha Network (habeshanetwork.com), a multi-vertical marketplace (commerce, real estate, jobs, pro services, community). Strong in fintech, event-driven systems, and AI integration.
summary.long: Senior Full-Stack Engineer and Founding Engineer co-founding Habesha Network (habeshanetwork.com): a unified marketplace and community platform — e-commerce, real estate, jobs, Angi-style professional services, meetups, news, events, and blogging. Strong background in scalable systems, microservices, Kafka-based event streaming, Redis, and cloud-native infrastructure. Proven track record in fintech, blockchain integrations, and AI-driven automation including compliance and risk scoring engines.

projects.title: Habesha Network
projects.description: habeshanetwork.com — large unified marketplace: e-commerce (products), real estate (properties), job marketplace, professional-services network (Angi-like pro discovery), plus community meetups, news, events, and blogging. AI-assisted features where applicable; core engineering is multi-sided listings, search/discovery, trust, and scalable backends.

projects.title: Habesha Service
projects.description: Professional service marketplace connecting clients with service providers in Ethiopia, featuring pixel-perfect UI, smooth animations, and mobile-first design.

projects.title: YellowCard Crypto Exchange Backend
projects.description: Mission-critical backend infrastructure for Africa’s leading crypto exchange with real-time transaction processing and scalable cloud systems.

projects.title: FinHub Core Banking Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade core banking platform (FinHub) with real-time processing, scalable financial infrastructure, and advanced backend architecture. Includes AI-powered fintech work on the same product: real-time risk scoring, compliance automation, and transaction validation for financial infrastructure.

projects.title: Taxiye Ride-Hailing Platform
projects.description: Full-stack ride-hailing web application with GPS tracking, payment integration, and real-time ride management system.

projects.title: TheDad.Digital E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: High-conversion e-commerce platform with WordPress + Shopify integrations and custom animation systems.

projects.title: SEPA Cyber Security Website
projects.description: Security-focused corporate platform with hardened WordPress architecture and custom plugin development.

projects.title: IT Run Technology Platform
projects.description: Corporate tech services website with advanced integrations and performance optimization.

projects.title: Test Automation Framework
projects.description: End-to-end test automation framework with BDD testing, full coverage pipelines, and CI-ready architecture.

projects.title: COVID-19 Surveillance Platform
projects.description: Open-source health monitoring system with real-time data collection and dynamic form generation.

projects.title: CV AI Chatbot (Hugging Face Space)
projects.description: AI-powered CV assistant chatbot using LLMs with structured profile reasoning deployed on Hugging Face Spaces.

experience.summary: Co-founding Habesha Network: multi-vertical marketplace (commerce, real estate, jobs, pro services, community/events/news/blog). Architecture, core APIs, identity, and marketplace infrastructure.
Built microservices, fintech integrations, AI systems, and event-driven architectures using Kafka, Redis, and Kubernetes.
Led automation testing, performance testing, and QA for distributed microservice systems.
Built SSR React apps, APIs, and CI/CD pipelines for production systems.
Developed microservices, CMS systems, and scalable backend APIs.
Built full-stack systems and QA automation frameworks.
